Home / Design & Creative Tools / GIMP

GIMP — open source alternative

Long-running open source raster image editor.

Strengths

  • Full feature set for photo retouching and painting.
  • Huge plugin ecosystem.
  • Totally free — no subscription.

Weaknesses

  • UI is dated and takes time to learn.
  • Non-destructive editing (layers/effects) is limited vs Photoshop.
  • Performance on very large files can lag.
License: GPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows, macOS, Linux

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

GIMP is used as an alternative to

Canva

Drag-and-drop graphic design for everyone.

See all alternatives →

Adobe Photoshop

Industry-standard raster image editor.

See all alternatives →

Sketch

Mac-first interface design tool.

See all alternatives →
